question: 202604，MDL工厂各个产品大类实际投入数量
normalized_question: 202604，mdl工厂各个产品大类实际投入数量
intent: 查询 2026 年 4 月 MDL 工厂按产品常用分类拆分的实际投入 panel 数量
sql: SELECT product_attributes.common_categories, SUM(production_actuals.Panel_qty) AS actual_input_panel_qty FROM production_actuals INNER JOIN product_attributes ON production_actuals.product_ID = product_attributes.product_ID WHERE production_actuals.work_date >= '2026-04-01' AND production_actuals.work_date < '2026-05-01' AND production_actuals.FACTORY = 'MDL' AND production_actuals.act_type = '投入' GROUP BY product_attributes.common_categories LIMIT 200;
notes: 真实调试样例。该问题验证字段语义目录把“产品大类/产品类别/产品分类”收敛到 common_categories，同时 MDL 工厂的实际投入数量默认走 Panel_qty 口径。

question: 26年MDL工厂top10投入型号及其物量
intent: 查询 2026 年 MDL 工厂投入型号 top10 及其 panel 物量
sql: SELECT product_ID, SUM(Panel_qty) AS actual_input_panel_qty FROM production_actuals WHERE work_date BETWEEN '2026-01-01' AND '2026-12-31' AND FACTORY = 'MDL' AND act_type = '投入' GROUP BY product_ID ORDER BY actual_input_panel_qty DESC LIMIT 10;
notes: 真实调试样例。LLM 生成 SQL 已经按生产实绩表、act_type=投入、Panel_qty 物量口径校验通过。

question: 2026年2月Array工厂审批版投入物量与实际物量Gap和达成率
normalized_question: 2026年2月array工厂审批版投入物量与实际物量gap和达成率
intent: 查询 2026 年 2 月 Array 工厂审批版投入物量、实际投入物量、Gap 和达成率
sql: WITH approved_input AS (SELECT plan_month AS biz_month, factory_code AS factory, SUM(target_IN_glass_qty) AS approved_input_qty FROM monthly_plan_approved WHERE plan_month = '2026-02' AND factory_code = 'ARRAY' GROUP BY plan_month, factory_code), actual_input AS (SELECT DATE_FORMAT(work_date, '%Y-%m') AS biz_month, FACTORY AS factory, SUM(GLS_qty) AS actual_input_qty FROM production_actuals WHERE work_date BETWEEN '2026-02-01' AND '2026-02-28' AND FACTORY = 'ARRAY' AND act_type = '投入' GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(work_date, '%Y-%m'), FACTORY) SELECT approved_input.biz_month AS biz_month, approved_input.factory AS factory, approved_input.approved_input_qty, COALESCE(actual_input.actual_input_qty, 0) AS actual_input_qty, COALESCE(actual_input.actual_input_qty, 0) - approved_input.approved_input_qty AS input_gap_qty, CASE WHEN approved_input.approved_input_qty = 0 THEN NULL ELSE COALESCE(actual_input.actual_input_qty, 0) / approved_input.approved_input_qty END AS input_achievement_rate FROM approved_input LEFT JOIN actual_input ON approved_input.biz_month = actual_input.biz_month AND approved_input.factory = actual_input.factory ORDER BY approved_input.biz_month LIMIT 200;
notes: 真实调试样例。该问题要求同时返回审批投入、实际投入、Gap 和达成率；Array 口径默认使用 GLS_qty 与 target_IN_glass_qty。

question: 最新5版p版需求中，202604需求量最多的fgcode是哪一个
normalized_question: 最新5版p版需求中，202604需求量最多的fgcode是哪一个
intent: 查询最新 5 版 P 版需求中 202604 需求量最高的 FGCODE
sql: WITH latest_versions AS (SELECT PM_VERSION FROM p_demand GROUP BY PM_VERSION ORDER BY PM_VERSION DESC LIMIT 5), demand_unpivot AS (SELECT PM_VERSION, FGCODE, CAST(MONTH AS CHAR) AS demand_month, REQUIREMENT_QTY AS demand_qty FROM p_demand UNION ALL SELECT PM_VERSION, FGCODE, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(CAST(MONTH AS CHAR), '01'), '%Y%m%d'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y%m') AS demand_month, NEXT_REQUIREMENT AS demand_qty FROM p_demand UNION ALL SELECT PM_VERSION, FGCODE, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(CAST(MONTH AS CHAR), '01'), '%Y%m%d'), INTERVAL 2 MONTH), '%Y%m') AS demand_month, LAST_REQUIREMENT AS demand_qty FROM p_demand UNION ALL SELECT PM_VERSION, FGCODE, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(CAST(MONTH AS CHAR), '01'), '%Y%m%d'), INTERVAL 3 MONTH), '%Y%m') AS demand_month, MONTH4 AS demand_qty FROM p_demand UNION ALL SELECT PM_VERSION, FGCODE, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(CAST(MONTH AS CHAR), '01'), '%Y%m%d'), INTERVAL 4 MONTH), '%Y%m') AS demand_month, MONTH5 AS demand_qty FROM p_demand UNION ALL SELECT PM_VERSION, FGCODE, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(CAST(MONTH AS CHAR), '01'), '%Y%m%d'), INTERVAL 5 MONTH), '%Y%m') AS demand_month, MONTH6 AS demand_qty FROM p_demand UNION ALL SELECT PM_VERSION, FGCODE, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(CAST(MONTH AS CHAR), '01'), '%Y%m%d'), INTERVAL 6 MONTH), '%Y%m') AS demand_month, MONTH7 AS demand_qty FROM p_demand) SELECT FGCODE, SUM(demand_qty) AS demand_qty FROM demand_unpivot WHERE demand_month = '202604' AND PM_VERSION IN (SELECT PM_VERSION FROM latest_versions) GROUP BY FGCODE ORDER BY demand_qty DESC LIMIT 1;
notes: 真实调试样例。当前记录的是 live LLM 生成出的 demand 横表展开 SQL。

question: 最新p版，最近6个月的ttl需求物量
normalized_question: 最新p版，最近6个月的ttl需求物量
intent: 查询最新 1 版 P 版需求在最近 6 个月各需求月份的 total 需求物量
sql: WITH latest_version AS (SELECT PM_VERSION FROM p_demand GROUP BY PM_VERSION ORDER BY PM_VERSION DESC LIMIT 1), demand_unpivot AS (SELECT PM_VERSION, FGCODE, CUSTOMER, CAST(MONTH AS CHAR) AS demand_month, REQUIREMENT_QTY AS demand_qty FROM p_demand UNION ALL SELECT PM_VERSION, FGCODE, CUSTOMER, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(CAST(MONTH AS CHAR), '01'), '%Y%m%d'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y%m') AS demand_month, NEXT_REQUIREMENT AS demand_qty FROM p_demand UNION ALL SELECT PM_VERSION, FGCODE, CUSTOMER, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(CAST(MONTH AS CHAR), '01'), '%Y%m%d'), INTERVAL 2 MONTH), '%Y%m') AS demand_month, LAST_REQUIREMENT AS demand_qty FROM p_demand UNION ALL SELECT PM_VERSION, FGCODE, CUSTOMER, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(CAST(MONTH AS CHAR), '01'), '%Y%m%d'), INTERVAL 3 MONTH), '%Y%m') AS demand_month, MONTH4 AS demand_qty FROM p_demand UNION ALL SELECT PM_VERSION, FGCODE, CUSTOMER, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(CAST(MONTH AS CHAR), '01'), '%Y%m%d'), INTERVAL 4 MONTH), '%Y%m') AS demand_month, MONTH5 AS demand_qty FROM p_demand UNION ALL SELECT PM_VERSION, FGCODE, CUSTOMER, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(CAST(MONTH AS CHAR), '01'), '%Y%m%d'), INTERVAL 5 MONTH), '%Y%m') AS demand_month, MONTH6 AS demand_qty FROM p_demand UNION ALL SELECT PM_VERSION, FGCODE, CUSTOMER, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(CAST(MONTH AS CHAR), '01'), '%Y%m%d'), INTERVAL 6 MONTH), '%Y%m') AS demand_month, MONTH7 AS demand_qty FROM p_demand) SELECT demand_month, SUM(COALESCE(demand_qty, 0)) AS ttl_demand_qty FROM demand_unpivot WHERE PM_VERSION IN (SELECT PM_VERSION FROM latest_version) AND demand_month BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 5 MONTH), '%Y%m') AND DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y%m') GROUP BY demand_month ORDER BY demand_month;
notes: 真实调试样例。当前校验目标是最新 1 版 P 版需求 + 最近 6 个月 + 月度 total 需求物量的语义解析与 SQL 结构。

question: 最新P版，2026年5月，Oxide产品数量是多少
normalized_question: 最新p版，2026年5月，oxide产品数量是多少
intent: 查询最新 1 版 P 版需求在 202605 目标需求月份下的 Oxide 产品数量
sql: WITH latest_version AS (SELECT PM_VERSION FROM p_demand GROUP BY PM_VERSION ORDER BY PM_VERSION DESC LIMIT 1), demand_unpivot AS (SELECT PM_VERSION, FGCODE, CAST(MONTH AS CHAR) AS demand_month, REQUIREMENT_QTY AS demand_qty FROM p_demand UNION ALL SELECT PM_VERSION, FGCODE, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(CAST(MONTH AS CHAR), '01'), '%Y%m%d'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH), '%Y%m') AS demand_month, NEXT_REQUIREMENT AS demand_qty FROM p_demand UNION ALL SELECT PM_VERSION, FGCODE, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(CAST(MONTH AS CHAR), '01'), '%Y%m%d'), INTERVAL 2 MONTH), '%Y%m') AS demand_month, LAST_REQUIREMENT AS demand_qty FROM p_demand UNION ALL SELECT PM_VERSION, FGCODE, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(CAST(MONTH AS CHAR), '01'), '%Y%m%d'), INTERVAL 3 MONTH), '%Y%m') AS demand_month, MONTH4 AS demand_qty FROM p_demand UNION ALL SELECT PM_VERSION, FGCODE, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(CAST(MONTH AS CHAR), '01'), '%Y%m%d'), INTERVAL 4 MONTH), '%Y%m') AS demand_month, MONTH5 AS demand_qty FROM p_demand UNION ALL SELECT PM_VERSION, FGCODE, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(CAST(MONTH AS CHAR), '01'), '%Y%m%d'), INTERVAL 5 MONTH), '%Y%m') AS demand_month, MONTH6 AS demand_qty FROM p_demand UNION ALL SELECT PM_VERSION, FGCODE, DATE_FORMAT(DATE_ADD(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(CAST(MONTH AS CHAR), '01'), '%Y%m%d'), INTERVAL 6 MONTH), '%Y%m') AS demand_month, MONTH7 AS demand_qty FROM p_demand) SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT product_attributes.product_ID) AS product_count FROM demand_unpivot JOIN product_attributes ON demand_unpivot.FGCODE = product_attributes.product_ID WHERE demand_unpivot.PM_VERSION IN (SELECT PM_VERSION FROM latest_version) AND demand_unpivot.demand_month = '202605' AND product_attributes.IS_OXIDE = 1 LIMIT 200;
notes: 真实问题样例。该题型同时要求：最新版本过滤、横表需求月份展开、产品属性维过滤，以及产品数量去重统计。

question: oms库存，近6个月库存变化趋势
normalized_question: oms库存，近6个月库存变化趋势
intent: 查询 OMS 库存在最近 6 个月按月份的库存变化趋势，默认同时返回 glass 与 panel 两套库存口径
sql: SELECT oms_inventory.report_month AS biz_month, SUM(oms_inventory.glass_qty) AS inventory_glass_qty, SUM(oms_inventory.panel_qty) AS inventory_panel_qty FROM oms_inventory WHERE oms_inventory.report_month BETWEEN DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 5 MONTH), '%Y-%m') AND DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m') GROUP BY oms_inventory.report_month ORDER BY oms_inventory.report_month LIMIT 200;
notes: 真实问题样例。当前校验目标是 OMS 库存趋势必须走 oms_inventory，按 biz_month 展示，并在非库龄场景下默认同时返回 glass_qty 与 panel_qty 两套库存口径。
